accounts.name: computation_account
docs: context.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: the ProcessBatch doc comment for the same UncheckedAccount rationale.

accounts.name: comp_def_account
docs: Can't check it here as it's not initialized yet.

accounts.name: comp_def_account
docs: has no discriminator, so Account<T> can't validate it. The
#[init_computation_definition_accounts] macro generates the PDA + owner
constraints that make this safe.

accounts.name: address_lookup_table
docs: pinned to derive_mxe_lut_pda above (our MXE's canonical LUT); the arcium
program verifies its contents during computation queuing.

accounts.name: lut_program
docs: as the CPI target for LUT modifications in `init_computation_def`.

accounts.name: computation_account
docs: (injected by #[arcium_callback]) against the instructions sysvar.

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: read-only inside validate_callback_ixs.

accounts.name: position_0
docs: `apply_fill_unchecked` (only for slots < n_orders that filled); `mut`
sets the writable bit.

accounts.name: user_collateral_0
docs: `credit_refund` (only for slots < n_orders that filled 0); `mut` sets
the writable bit.

accounts.name: computation_account
docs: initializes + checks during queue_computation.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: `read_pyth_price`. UncheckedAccount because the SDK's typed
Account<PriceUpdateV2> needs anchor-lang ^0.32.1 (Arcium pins us to
1.0.2); we hand-roll the struct in src/pyth.rs.

errors.name: InvalidComputation
errors.msg: Invalid computation

errors.name: InvalidCallback
errors.msg: Invalid callback

errors.name: CustomError
errors.msg: Custom error message

errors.name: AbortedComputation
errors.msg: The computation was aborted

errors.name: BatchFull
errors.msg: Batch buffer is full

errors.name: BatchWindowClosed
errors.msg: Batch window has closed

errors.name: BatchWindowOpen
errors.msg: Batch window has not yet closed

errors.name: BatchEmpty
errors.msg: Batch is empty

errors.name: BatchNotReady
errors.msg: Batch is not ready to process (needs at least 1 order)

errors.name: PoolSkewExceeded
errors.msg: Pool would exceed the maximum net skew

errors.name: NoPendingOrder
errors.msg: No pending order for this user in the current batch

errors.name: BatchAlreadyProcessing
errors.msg: Batch is already being processed (computation in flight)

errors.name: NoOpenPosition
errors.msg: No open position to close

errors.name: PositionUnderwater
errors.msg: Position is underwater; cannot self-close (liquidation required)

errors.name: PositionNotLiquidatable
errors.msg: Position is healthy; not eligible for liquidation

errors.name: SelfLiquidationNotAllowed
errors.msg: Cannot liquidate your own position

errors.name: MarketAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Market is already initialized

errors.name: InvalidPythFeed
errors.msg: Invalid Pyth feed

errors.name: InvalidPythAccount
errors.msg: Pyth account is not owned by the receiver program or has bad data

errors.name: PythVerificationInsufficient
errors.msg: Pyth price update is not fully verified (Wormhole 2/3 threshold)

errors.name: PythFeedIdMismatch
errors.msg: Pyth account is for a different asset than the market expects

errors.name: PythPriceStale
errors.msg: Pyth price is stale beyond MAX_PRICE_AGE_SECS

errors.name: PythPriceInvalid
errors.msg: Pyth reported a non-positive price

errors.name: PythConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Pyth confidence interval exceeds MAX_PRICE_CONF_BPS of price

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Insufficient collateral balance

errors.name: WithdrawRateLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Withdrawal would exceed per-slot rate limit (5% of vault)

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

types.name: AddTogetherOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: ClockAccount
docs: An account storing the current network epoch

types.name: ComputationDefinitionAccount
docs: An account representing a [ComputationDefinition] in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationDefinitionMeta
docs: A computation definition for execution in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationSignature
docs: The signature of a computation defined in a [ComputationDefinition].

types.name: Epoch
docs: The network epoch

types.name: MXEAccount
docs: A MPC Execution Environment.

types.name: MatchBatchOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: MxeStatus
docs: The status of an MXE.

types.name: NodeMetadata
docs: location as [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html) country code

types.name: NodeRef
docs: A reference to a node in the cluster.
The offset is to derive the Node Account.
The current_total_rewards is the total rewards the node has received so far in the current
epoch.

types.name: Output
docs: An output of a computation.
We currently don't support encrypted outputs yet since encrypted values are passed via
data objects.

types.name: Parameter
docs: A parameter of a computation.
We differentiate between plaintext and encrypted parameters and data objects.
Plaintext parameters are directly provided as their value.
Encrypted parameters are provided as an offchain reference to the data.
Data objects are provided as a reference to the data object account.

types.name: SetUnset
docs: Utility struct to store a value that needs to be set by a certain number of participants (keys
in our case). Once all participants have set the value, the value is considered set and we only
store it once.
